payload.answer: The prior proposal was invalid or unsafe, so I’m not committing any memory changes. Please choose a safe repair option or provide the intended memory update again.
repair_options: Retry the memory update with a stricter schema-compliant generator.
Escalate to a stronger validation/generation path before proposing any memory change.
Reject the unsafe proposal and make no changes.
Ask the user to restate the intended memory update in clear terms.
If the intended update is additive, offer a choice to add it separately or keep both facts without merging.
